description: CompositionBlue shrug made of 87% acrylic and 13% lurex, has silver foil detailing on the body and puffed three-quarter sleevesFitSlimWash careWash, dry and iron inside outMachine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergentDo not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry cleanDry flat in shadeCool iron, but do not iron on print or embroideryThis warm knitted shrug from jealous 21 is a style factor for sure. It promises to keep you warm as well as adds a glam quotient to your attire. The  colour of the shrug lets you wear it along with light as well as bright coloured tops, depending on your mood!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shrugsHeight: 5'8", Chest: 33"
